title: advancedchatbox-next
body:
CONTINUED VERSION FOR: [AdvancedChatBox](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancedchatbox)

# AdvancedChatBox
AdvancedChatBox allows for complex suggestions and tab completion to be added into the Minecraft chat box.

Please submit bugs to the [issue tracker](https://github.com/Arematics/AdvancedChatBox/issues).

## Dependencies
[AdvancedChatCore-Next](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancedchatcore-next) is required to run the mod.

## Features
- Spelling Checker powered by LanguageTool
- In-Chat Calculator
- Toggle player tab suggestions
- Add custom chat suggestions in the form of shortcuts
- Change the color of the suggestors
- Custom command highlighting
- Built-in JSON linter for commands
- Legacy color code formatting when typing messages
  
# Credits n' more
Code & Mastermind: DarkKronicle

Language & Proofreading: Chronos22
